case_title: CHAN, DIANA VS GROSS, ALLAN STANLEY C/O LUIS WINER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $729.12 FILED BY CHAN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT GROSS, ALLAN STANLEY C/O LUIS WINER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GROSS, ALLAN STANLEY C/O LUIS WINER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROSS, ALLAN STANLEY C/O LUIS WINER $582.12 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $621.12, JUDGMENT STAYED UNTIL 9/12/94. IF DEFT PAYS$582.12 TO PLTF BY SAID DATE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GROSS, ALLAN STANLEY C/O LUIS WINER
